LAW AND MOTION 301, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 CONTINUED FROM MAR-28-2011 TO LAW AND MOTION AT APR-12-2011, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 301 PER AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES.
LAW AND MOTION 301, PREVIOUSLY SUBMITTED ON APRIL 12, 2011, PETITIONER WAYNE SMITH'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF MANDAMUS PURSUANT TO CCP 1094.5 IS GRANTED. JUDGE PETER J. BUSCH
